readings.summary: It is love that I desire, not sacrifice.

readings.citation:
Ps 50:1, 8, 12–13, 14–15
To the upright I will show the saving power of God.
readings.antiphon:
Ps 50:1, 8, 12–13, 14–15
To the upright I will show the saving power of God.

readings.summary: Abraham was strengthened by faith and gave glory to God.

The Lord sent me to bring glad tidings to the poor,
and to proclaim liberty to captives.
I did not come to call the righteous but sinners.

antiphons.text:
The Lord is my light and my salvation; whom shall I fear?
The Lord is the stronghold of my life; whom should I dread?
When those who do evil draw near, they stumble and fall.

The Lord is my rock, my fortress, and my deliverer;
my God is my saving strength.

God is love, and whoever abides in love
abides in God, and God in him.

penitentialAct.title: Kyrie • Misa Del Mundo
penitentialAct.composer: Only if needed. Talk to presider!
